name_romaji: Gimin Saitō Hikonai no Haka Tsuketari Kankei Monjo
name_en: Grave of the Righteous Commoner Saitō Hikonai, with Related Documents
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), the grave of the righteous commoner Saitō Hikonai together with related documents. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Shimoshiwada district.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a hōkyōintō stone stupa. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Hakozaki district.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a stone monument. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Hakozaki district.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a mound together with related documents. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Kawaramachi district.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), the site of a jin'ya administrative office. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Okamae district.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a fudezuka brush-burial mound. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Fushiguro district.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a commemorative stone monument. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Hakozaki district.

name_en: Former Site of Gokurakuin of the Shugen Date Family
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), the former site of Gokurakuin associated with the Shugen Date family. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Nakahata district.

name_en: Grave Monument of Gokurakuin of the Shugen Date Family
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a grave monument associated with the Shugen Date family. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Hiromae district.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a self-carved stone monument of Kanno Hachirō. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Hobara-machi Kanaharada.

name_romaji: Kumasaka Haryō・Kumasaka Taishū・Kumasaka Banya Bohi
name_en: Grave Monuments of Kumasaka Haryō, Taishū, and Banya
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), the grave monuments of Kumasaka Haryō, Taishū, and Banya. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Hobara-machi Kamihobara.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a group of ancient burial mounds. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Hosoya.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), the site of a castle. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Kakeda.

name_en: Gyōninda Burial Mound or Sutra Mound
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), an ancient burial mound or sutra mound. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Shimooguni.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a stone monument. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Ōishi.

name_en: Tenpyō Magistrate's Office Site of Shimotedo Domain
description_en: A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), the site of the Tenpyō jin'ya administrative office of the Shimotedo domain. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Shimotedo.
A monument classified as a historic site (shiseki), a samurai cemetery. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Shimotedo.
A monument classified as a place of scenic beauty (meishō). It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Kamitedo.

name_en: Great Cedar Group of Suwa Shrine
description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a group of large Japanese cedar trees. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Hobara-machi Tomizawa.
A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a large ginkgo tree. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Aza Ushiromachi.
A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a stand of pine trees. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Funyū.
A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a zelkova tree. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Izumihara.
A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a cherry tree. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Kamioguni.
A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a ginkgo tree with aerial-root formations. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Nukada.

name_en: Wooden Saddle, with Certificate and Accompanying Letter
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as craft, a wooden saddle with an accompanying certificate and letter. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.

name_en: Mandalas of the Two Realms (Diamond and Womb Realms)
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a pair of mandalas of the Diamond and Womb Realms. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden standing image of the Shō-Kannon. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden seated image of Amida (Amitābha) Buddha. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden standing image of Amida (Amitābha) Buddha. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden seated image of Dainichi (Vairocana) Buddha. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden seated image of the three-faced Daikokuten. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden seated image of the Nyoirin Kannon. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden seated image of Yakushi (Bhaiṣajyaguru) Buddha. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden seated image of the crowned Shaka (Śākyamuni) Buddha. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.

name_romaji: Yoshikura Hachiman Jinja Honden Hekimen Chōkoku (Nanmen Chōkoku, Seimen Chōkoku, Hokumen Chōkoku)
name_en: Wall Carvings of the Main Hall of Yoshikura Hachiman Shrine (South, West, and North Faces)
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, comprising the south-, west-, and north-face wall carvings of the main hall of Yoshikura Hachiman Shrine. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.

name_en: Stone Memorial Stupa Group of Kōshakuji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as an archaeological material, a group of stone memorial stupas. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
A tangible cultural property classified as an archaeological material, a stone memorial stupa. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.

name_en: Excavated Artifacts from Tsukinowayama Tomb No. 1
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as an archaeological material, a set of artifacts excavated from Tsukinowayama Tomb No. 1. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.

name_en: Excavated Artifacts from the Kachiguchi Maehata Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as an archaeological material, a set of artifacts excavated from the Kachiguchi Maehata site. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.

name_romaji: Okajima Kashima Jinja no Zuika Sōhō Hachiryōkyō
name_en: Eight-Lobed Mirror with Auspicious Flowers and Paired Phoenixes of Okajima Kashima Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as an archaeological material, an eight-lobed bronze mirror decorated with auspicious flowers and paired phoenixes. It is municipally designated by Fukushima City.
